items.title: Restaurant Stocks Are in the Soup. There’s No Quick Fix.
items.description: It’s undoubtedly been a tough year for restaurants.  Most of the major players in the industry are in the red so far this year, and companies like  Sweetgreen Shake Shack Cava Group Chipotle Mexican Grill Wendy’s Bloomin’ Brands Jack in the Box  and  Dine Brands Global  are down double digits.  The data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics showed that food services & drinking places added 11,000 jobs to 12.38 million in August, marking the largest increase since May. However the trailing three-month job creation number fell below 30,000, the lowest level in more than half a decade.
